tickets.title: Display context for the selected approval
tickets.description: Show the task, inputs, and workflow context for the currently highlighted approval in the queue.
acceptanceCriteria: A details pane updates as the user moves the cursor through the queue.
Details include the specific question/gate and any relevant payload.
implementationNotes: Consider a split-pane layout within the approvals view (list on left, details on right or bottom).

tickets.title: Implement inline approval action
tickets.description: Allow the user to approve a gate directly from the TUI.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing the configured key (e.g., 'a') sends an approve API request.
Upon success, the item is removed from the pending queue.
implementationNotes: Show a loading indicator while the API request is inflight.

tickets.title: Implement inline deny action
tickets.description: Allow the user to deny a gate directly from the TUI.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing the configured key (e.g., 'd' or 'x') sends a deny API request.
Upon success, the item is removed from the pending queue.
implementationNotes: Provide an optional input field for a denial reason if supported by the Smithers API.

tickets.title: Show pending approval badges in global UI
tickets.description: Display a visual indicator in the main UI (e.g., header or status bar) when approvals are pending.
acceptanceCriteria: If `pending_count > 0`, a badge is visible on the main screen.
Badge updates dynamically via SSE events.
implementationNotes: Integrate with Crush's existing status bar (`internal/ui/model/status.go`) to add the badge.

tickets.title: Build the pending approvals queue
tickets.description: Fetch and display a list of all pending approval gates from the Smithers API/DB.
acceptanceCriteria: The view shows a selectable list/table of pending approvals.
List dynamically updates if new approvals arrive via SSE.
implementationNotes: Use Bubble Tea's `list` or `table` component. Fetch data via the Smithers API client.

tickets.title: Show recent approval decisions
tickets.description: Display a history of recently approved or denied gates in the approvals view.
acceptanceCriteria: A section or toggleable view shows historical decisions.
Each entry shows the decision made and timestamps.
implementationNotes: This might be a separate tab within the approvals view or a section below the pending queue.

tickets.title: Add E2E tests for approvals and notifications
tickets.description: Implement automated testing for the approvals flow using both the terminal E2E harness and VHS recordings.
acceptanceCriteria: Playwright-style E2E test added covering the notification -> queue -> approve flow.
VHS script created demonstrating a happy-path approval.
implementationNotes: Mock the Smithers HTTP server in the E2E test to emit the `ApprovalRequested` SSE event and respond to the approval POST.

tickets.title: Scaffold the approvals TUI view
tickets.description: Create the base `approvals` view and register it in the router with the `ctrl+a` keybinding.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing `ctrl+a` navigates to the empty approvals view.
Pressing `esc` returns to the previous view.
implementationNotes: Follow the new Router pattern defined in `03-ENGINEERING.md`. Add `Approvals` key to `keys.go`.

tickets.title: Build in-terminal toast notification component
tickets.description: Create an in-terminal toast overlay component designed to render at the bottom-right of the TUI.
acceptanceCriteria: Component supports rendering Title, Body, and action hints.
Component respects a TTL for auto-dismissal.
Component structure lives in internal/ui/components/notification.go.
implementationNotes: Unlike the existing Crush native notifications (in internal/ui/notification), this needs to be an in-terminal Bubble Tea component drawn via Lip Gloss over the existing views.

tickets.title: Show notifications for approval requests
tickets.description: Listen for Smithers SSE events indicating a new approval gate and show a toast notification.
acceptanceCriteria: When an `ApprovalRequested` SSE event is received, a toast appears.
Toast includes 'Approve' and 'View' action hints.
implementationNotes: Subscribe to the appropriate event from `SmithersClient.StreamEvents()` and map it to the notification component.

tickets.title: Show notifications for run completions
tickets.description: Show a brief toast notification when a Smithers run completes successfully.
acceptanceCriteria: When a `RunCompleted` SSE event is received, a success toast appears.
implementationNotes: Format the toast with success styling (Lip Gloss green) and a short TTL.

tickets.title: Show notifications for run failures
tickets.description: Show a toast notification when a Smithers run fails.
acceptanceCriteria: When a `RunFailed` SSE event is received, a failure toast appears.
implementationNotes: Format the toast with error styling (Lip Gloss red) and the run ID.

tickets.title: Integrate toast overlays into the main TUI loop
tickets.description: Hook the new toast component into the global UI view so it renders on top of the active route.
acceptanceCriteria: The toast overlay renders over chat, runs, or any other routed view.
Notifications can be triggered globally via the pubsub event bus.
implementationNotes: Modify `UI.View()` in `internal/ui/model/ui.go` to append the rendered notification string (positioned bottom-right) after rendering the current view from the Router.
